error_signature: queries with parameters return an empty result
title: Postgres node returns empty result with parameters
symptom: When using parameters in a Postgres query, the result is empty, while hardcoded values work. The query with parameters like $1 or '{{ $json.loja }}' fails to return data.
not_this_if: Using a newer version of the Postgres node
root_cause: The issue arises from using an outdated version of the Postgres node, which may have bugs affecting parameterized queries. Creating a new node in the latest version resolves the issue.
fix_steps: Create a new Postgres node using the latest version
agent_instruction: Delete the old Postgres node and create a new one with the latest version.
